Fantasy Bots are back, yippee! I will still mainly focus on normal bots. These fantasy bots will always be an addition to the normal bots. They'll mostly be the second bot of the day. vice versa, if I release a Fantasy bot first, a normal bot will release later.


If people like the Fantasy Bots I'll make the World a lot more detailed with a map and all that aswell




Also don't be a weirdo in my comments bruh, idc if you raped the char, convinced her to kill herself or something like that. that's just weird
If she speaks for you its not my fault, its the fault of the LLM, OAI or yours for not making the message detailed enough. Same with the Twitch Chat appearing, it's a JLLM bug, not my fault.
